top_stories.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
top_stories.insight: This indicates a potential shift in monetary policy, affecting interest rates and the overall economy.

top_stories.title: Fed holds rates steady, pares down statement to remove cutting bias
top_stories.insight: The decision to hold rates steady and remove the cutting bias suggests a more neutral stance from the Fed.

top_stories.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
top_stories.insight: The changes to the Fed rate statement may indicate a shift in the Fed's approach to monetary policy.

top_stories.title: South Africa’s Kganyago Warns Inflation Expectations Are Rising
top_stories.insight: Rising inflation expectations in South Africa may lead to changes in monetary policy.

top_stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_stories.insight: The AI rout may have a significant impact on the stock market and the technology sector.

daily_summary: The financial markets are experiencing significant developments, with the Fed's hawkish stance and changes to the rate statement being major factors. Inflation expectations are rising in South Africa, and the stock market is experiencing a broad AI rout.
